tenYearTarget.text: Target: December 31, 2036 — W-2 income optional, homestead complete, and an ownership-based life on our land.
$20,000/month net non-W-2 income — W-2 income optional
Home, shop, yard, and homestead complete and fully functional
Ranch profitable, regenerative, and simple enough to enjoy
Family OS actively guiding decisions, priorities, and alignment
Strong faith, strong marriage, and deep parent-child connection
Healthy margin in time, finances, emotions, and operations
Freer, calmer, wiser, healthier, and more present

threeYearVision.text: Target: December 31, 2028 — building calm, freedom, and stability without sacrificing family.
Calm structure replaces constant reaction mode
Home becomes the steady center for homeschooling, meals, routines, and connection
Marriage functions as a team — communicating earlier, resetting before chaos sets in
Kids deeply included and connected — older girls protected, Owen intentionally supported
Baby enters a stable, protected family rhythm from the start
Ranch easier to manage with better systems and lower friction
Financial momentum building steadily toward W-2 independence

goals.name: Create at least one intentional family memory or shared experience each month
Build and sustain simple, consistent physical and emotional health routines that protect our capacity through the baby year
Grow non-W-2 income and create a clear, written financial roadmap toward W-2 independence
Welcome the new baby with preparation and intention, while protecting our marriage and each child during this major transition
Establish a simple, consistent weekly faith and character rhythm for our family
Fully activate and consistently use the Family OS in Notion, with the weekly review rhythm running reliably
Prepare the home and homestead for the baby’s arrival and complete the highest-impact improvements that reduce daily friction
The Family OS Is Alive and Working
Financial Momentum is Real and Measurable
Each Child Is in an Actively Protected and Intentional Season
Health Is Our Foundation, Not an Afterthought
The Ranch Runs Without Overwhelming the Family

rocks.name: Simple health baseline maintained for both Noah and Tricia
Financial clarity report created and next rental door decision made
Welcome the baby into a prepared home and a protected postpartum rhythm
Weekly Family OS review maintained — 8 of 13 weeks
